full_text: Pretorius to Pollard, Caught by van der Dussen!! Pollard walks off with a wry smile on his face. Plenty of drama for one ball. RvD was positioned right behind the bowler. Pretorius offers the slower ball and Pollard smashes it straight back over, RvD sits down and takes it low to the ground, there was a puff of dust when the ball landed, but since the soft signal was OUT, the third umpire did not have conclusive evidence to overturn the onfield call. RvD also took Aleem Dar down as he throws the ball towards the umpire and Dar was not watching, he reacts quickly and ducks out of the way. Everyone saw the funny side of that.

West Indies losing the momentum towards the end.

full_text: Nortje to Russell, Bowled!! Ufff! He was beaten for pace, the ball sneaks under his willow to crash into off. Big wicket at this stage for South Africa. Russell would have done plenty of damage in the last 10 balls.
